## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes (no new warnings)

- [ ] `cargo deny check` passes

- [ ] Docs updated if this changes user-facing behaviour
